subject: Two armored warrior figures wreathed in green spectral energy, standing in a dim interior space
description: Two heavily armored figures stand in a dim, murky space, both enveloped in wisps of glowing green spectral energy. Their plate armor is dark and worn. The figure on the left holds something that pulses with the same green light; the one on the right is partially obscured by a translucent green wraith-like emanation. A glowing orange eye or lantern burns in a dark archway in the upper background. The overall palette is deep purple-blue with sharp acid-green highlights, giving the scene a necromantic, underworld atmosphere.
foreground: Two dark-armored figures with green spectral energy rising around them
background: Dim archway with glowing orange light source
emotion: ominous stillness; figures appear to be rising or reforming
